name: California State Insulation
tagline: Insulation and full general-contracting work for Santa Rosa homes and job sites — licensed, bonded, and at it since 2001.
seoDescription: California State Insulation & General Contractor is a Santa Rosa, CA insulation and general building company owned by Alvaro Beltran, serving Sonoma County since 2001 (CSLB Lic. #795223).

sections.heading: Insulation and building work that holds up, season after season
sections.subheading: California State Insulation & General Contractor handles insulation, framing, plaster, drywall, and concrete for homes and job sites across Sonoma County. Owner-run by Alvaro Beltran since 2001.

sections.heading: An owner-run shop that does the work itself
body: California State Insulation & General Contractor has been a fixture in Santa Rosa since 2001. Owner Alvaro Beltran built the business one job at a time, holding both an Insulation & Acoustical and a General Building license — so the same shop can insulate a home and handle the framing, plaster, drywall, and concrete around it.

From single-family retrofits to commercial projects, the work has ranged from small repairs to builds north of half a million dollars. It's a hands-on operation: when you call, you're talking to the people who'll actually be on the job, not a call center.
highlights: CSLB License #795223 — Insulation & Acoustical + General Building
Bonded and carries workers' compensation insurance
Projects from small repairs to $600K+ builds

sections.heading: One shop for the shell of your project

items.title: Insulation & Acoustical
items.description: Residential and commercial insulation and acoustical work — the company's core trade and licensed specialty since day one.

items.title: General Building & Construction
items.description: Full general-contracting under a CSLB General Building license, from new construction to additions and remodels.

items.title: Framing
items.description: Wood framing for new builds, additions, and structural changes, squared up and ready for the trades that follow.

items.title: Stucco & Exterior Plaster
items.description: Exterior stucco and plaster that seals and finishes the building envelope to hold up in the North Bay climate.

items.title: Interior Plaster & Drywall
items.description: Interior plaster and drywall, hung and finished for a clean, paint-ready surface.

items.title: Concrete & Demolition
items.description: Concrete work and demolition to prep a site or close out the parts of a job other contractors leave behind.

items.title: Call or message
items.body: Tell us about the property and what you're trying to get done — insulation, a remodel, or a full shell.

items.title: We walk the job
items.body: We look at the site in person, talk through the scope, and give you an honest read on the work.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our crew handles it directly, licensed and bonded, keeping you posted as it moves.

items.title: You're squared away
items.body: The job's finished to standard and stands behind the license it was done under.

sections.heading: Why owners call California State Insulation

items.title: Two licenses, one crew
items.body: Insulation & Acoustical plus General Building means fewer subs to coordinate.

items.title: Licensed, bonded & insured
items.body: CSLB #795223, with a surety bond and workers' comp — the work is covered.

items.title: Local since 2001
items.body: More than two decades of Sonoma County jobs behind every estimate.

items.title: You talk to the owner
items.body: Alvaro runs the jobs himself — no layers between you and the work.

sections.heading: Have a project in Sonoma County?
sections.body: Reach California State Insulation at 1244 Tapadera Drive, Santa Rosa. Call (707) 546-3177 — Alvaro is glad to take a look.

sections.heading: Insulation through finish work, under one license
sections.subheading: California State Insulation carries both an Insulation & Acoustical and a General Building license, so a single Santa Rosa shop can take a project from the studs to the stucco.

items.a: Yes. California State Insulation holds CSLB License #795223 (Insulation & Acoustical and General Building), carries a surety bond, and holds workers' compensation insurance.
We're based in Santa Rosa and work throughout Sonoma County.
No. Insulation is our specialty, but our General Building license lets us also handle framing, stucco, plaster, drywall, concrete, and demolition.

items.q: How do I get a quote?
items.a: Call us at (707) 546-3177 or email calstate707@gmail.com and we'll set up a time to look at the job.

sections.heading: Let's talk about your project
sections.body: Find us at 1244 Tapadera Drive, Santa Rosa, CA 95407. Call (707) 546-3177 — we're glad to help.
